signup.title: Create your account
signup.description: Join MATHBHOOT securely. After verifying your email, username creation will become available in the next onboarding step.
signup.privacyNotice: Your name, date of birth and email are private account information. They will not be displayed publicly.
signup.success: Account created. Check your email and follow the verification link before logging in.
signup.passwordMismatch: The two passwords do not match.
signup.passwordRule: Use at least 12 characters, including uppercase, lowercase, a number and a symbol.

reset.title: Reset your password
reset.description: Enter your account email. If it is registered, Supabase will send a secure reset link.
reset.success: If that account exists, a password-reset email has been sent.

updatePassword.title: Choose a new password
updatePassword.description: Your reset link is valid. Set a new password to protect your account.

account.title: Your account
account.onboarding: Username and public profile creation will be added in Feature 2.

messages.captchaWaiting: Complete the security check before continuing.
messages.captchaExpired: The security check expired. Please complete it again.
messages.captchaError: The security check could not be loaded. Check your connection and try again.
messages.captchaErrorCode: The security check failed (Cloudflare code: {code}). Please try again or contact MATHBHOOT support.
messages.connectionUnavailable: Secure account services are temporarily unavailable.
messages.genericError: The request could not be completed safely. Please check the details and try again.
messages.serviceErrorCode: The request could not be completed safely (service code: {code}). Please try again shortly.
messages.loginFailed: The email or password is incorrect, or the email has not been verified.
messages.loggedOut: You have been logged out safely.
messages.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
